decks.notes: The deck focuses on using artifacts and synergies between cards to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. It utilizes cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble for mana acceleration, while also utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Pithing Needle to control the board. The inclusion of Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga allows for recurring threats and additional value generation, while cards like Claws of Gix and Tormod's Crypt provide additional utility and graveyard hate. Affinity for artifacts is key in this deck to enable powerful synergies and win conditions.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard to bring out powerful creatures such as Hollow One and Vengevine at a fast pace. It utilizes cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry to discard cards and trigger abilities that allow for explosive plays. By being aggressive and proactive, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of strong creatures and burn spells. The inclusion of Detective's Phoenix and Marauding Mako adds additional threats to the board, making it difficult for opponents to keep up with the pressure.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, while utilizing blink effects like Flickerwisp and Ephemerate to benefit from entering the battlefield effects multiple times. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's board and hand. Quantum Riddler and Witch Enchanter provide additional value through card draw. Teferi, Time Raveler disrupts the opponent's strategy and allows for additional plays on your turn. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive plays.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using low-cost spells and efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Slickshot Show-Off, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck aims to pressure the opponent early and consistently. The deck also includes card draw and selection spells like Mishra's Bauble, Preordain, and Expressive Iteration to maintain card advantage and find the necessary pieces to close out the game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on efficiently overwhelming opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, while also using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge to remove any blockers or finish off opponents. The deck also utilizes cards like Guide of Souls and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to buff creatures and push for lethal damage. The goal is to apply constant pressure and close out games quickly.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly swarm the board with efficient creatures such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to burn down the opponent's life total. Ranger-Captain of Eos and Voice of Victory provide additional value and disruption, while Seasoned Pyromancer helps with card advantage. The deck aims to apply pressure early and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying cheap artifacts and using them to exploit synergies with cards like Urza's Saga and Emry, Lurker of the Loch. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient threats, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. The deck is designed to be proactive and apply pressure from the early turns of the game, leveraging the power of artifacts and efficient mana production to gain an advantage and close out games quickly.

This Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on quickly assembling a strong board presence through efficient artifact creatures and spell support, utilizing Urza's Saga and Mox Opal to ramp and enable explosive plays. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble provide card advantage and graveyard recursion, while Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer disruption and control options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early threats and maintain pressure through efficient artifact synergies, while also having the ability to adapt and control the game state as needed.

The deck revolves around reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Fallaji Archaeologist. It also utilizes instant spells like Ephemerate and Faithful Mending to protect and combo off with its creatures. The deck runs a mix of fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent mana fixing, with some disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Force of Negation. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and instant speed reanimation.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the powerful Urza lands (Urza's Tower, Urza's Mine, and Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. This mana is then used to cast strong colorless spells, such as Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Emrakul, the Promised End, as well as planeswalkers like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms. The deck also includes various control elements like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain control of the battlefield.

The deck focuses on utilizing a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also has some control elements with cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Blood Moon to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its fast creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also having some flexibility with cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Thraben Charm. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide additional power and versatility in combat.

This aggro Modern deck focuses on fast and efficient burn spells and creatures to take down the opponent quickly. With a low mana curve and a high amount of direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Skewer the Critics, the deck aims to deal damage rapidly and prevent the opponent from stabilizing. The creatures, such as Monastery Swiftspear and Goblin Guide, help apply additional pressure and ensure a quick victory. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing for explosive starts and relentless aggression.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful combo using Basking Broodscale and Malevolent Rumble to generate tokens and pump them up with Blade of the Bloodchief. The key strategy is to ramp quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to get out key pieces like Emrakul, the Promised End and then overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. Additionally, the deck includes disruption with cards like Unholy Heat and Kozilek's Command to control the board and protect the combo. The goal is to create a dominant board presence and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful, synergistic combo.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through cheap spells and creatures. By utilizing cards like Slickshot Show-Off, Dragon's Rage Channeler, Monastery Swiftspear, and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain a fast pace throughout the game. Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration help with card selection and setting up powerful plays. The deck also includes some land-fetching cards like Scalding Tarn and Arid Mesa to ensure consistent mana base for casting spells efficiently.

The main focus of the deck is to efficiently ramp up mana using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Amulet of Vigor, allowing for the quick deployment of powerful combo pieces like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. The deck also includes utility lands like Urza's Saga and Tolaria West to search for specific cards needed for the combo. Malevolent Rumble and Green Sun's Zenith provide additional control and search options, while cards like Aftermath Analyst and Cultivator Colossus offer alternative win conditions. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful ramp and combo potential.

Utilizing self-mill and control elements, this deck aims to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance. Psychic Frog and Atraxa, Grand Unifier provide additional card advantage and disruption, while Quantum Riddler and Winternight Stories add consistency to the combo. Consign to Memory and Faithful Mending help with filtering and graveyard manipulation, while Thoughtseize and Force of Negation disrupt opponents' game plans. The deck excels at quickly assembling its combo pieces and overwhelming opponents with powerful creatures, while also being able to adapt to various situations through control elements.
